title: Hunter Monarch
description:
As an Spiderkhan, mastery over your web-swinging will be key.

Left-click with the Grappling Hook to fire - Then, when it's attached to a surface, hold Jump to pull yourself up, and Left-click again to disconnect. Once disconnected, you can quickly Sneak to double-jump, giving you the extra height needed to either swing further up, or get to where you need to be.

If you're by either a flat or inclining surface, you can hold jump against the wall surface and quickly scurry up it without issue.

Whilst grappling, Right-click is free to use your trust Spider Javelin with. It has limitless durability and built-in Loyalty, so throw it as many times as you wish! It also has the capacity to trap enemies in temporary webs when thrown - Make good use of this, especially on faster enemies!

The greatest threat towards you is your small health pool. Fortunately, this can be countered via Diet Diversity: The more varied your diet, the more maxium health you can accrue! Make good use of your mobility and find as many different ingredients as you can to get those hitpoints up!
